summary: How much money is “enough”? Karan Datta makes a powerful point: “How much is enough” has no meaning unless you make it personal. Because even at ₹80,000 crore net worth, the biggest industrialists are still working.

seo.title: Money Infinite Hai. Time Finite. | How Much Is Enough? | Karan Datta
seo.description: How much money is “enough”? Karan Datta makes a powerful point: “How much is enough” has no meaning unless you make it personal. Because even at ₹80,000

takeaways.text: "How much is enough" stays meaningless as a number until you make it personal to your own life and goals.
Even at 80,000 crore net worth, the biggest industrialists are still working, which shows the number keeps moving unless you decide where it stops.
Money can be made again, but time cannot, so treat time as the scarcer of the two.
Once you define your "enough", you can plan your life and finances backwards from that number instead of chasing an endless target.
The specific products you pick matter less than getting clear on your number and the goals behind it.
